title: oleandra neriiformis var. pilosa
intro: Oleandra neriiformis var. pilosa, also known as the Velvet Chain Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Oleandraceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The leaves of the Velvet Chain Fern can be used to make herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
